name: polymath-connector-azure
description: Azure connector: cli-only wrapper around `az` for resource inspection — describe, role-assignment + can-i check, activity-log writes, cost ping.

azureSubscription.title: Azure subscription ID
azureSubscription.description: Subscription ID (GUID). Resources are scoped under this subscription unless an absolute ARM ID overrides.

azureLocation.title: Default Azure location
azureLocation.description: Default region for regional resources (e.g. eastus, westeurope).
